series_metadata.series_description: Packets maintained on employees who have filed a grievance under a corresponding Collective Bargaining Agreement. Records may include: Grievance Form; Hearing Officer’s Report and Recommendation; Adjudication Order; Arbitration Panel Decision; OCSEA and District 1199 Exempt Grievance Folders; step responses, exhibits, mediation, arbitration information, Non-Agreements; Due Process Meeting; Union document requests; and, any other miscellaneous record relating to the processing of a grievance.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three (3) calendar years from date grievance is closed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. (Be aware that some collective contracts specify where such documents can be kept.) ; Electronic: three (3) calendar years from date grievance is closed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. (Be aware that some collective contracts specify where such documents can be kept.)
